details: The agent successfully queried the information_schema.columns catalog (not guessing) using `supabase db query --linked`, retrieved all 9 columns with correct names and data types (id/bigint, author_id/bigint, title/text, slug/text, body/text, status/text, view_count/integer, published_at/timestamp with time zone, created_at/timestamp with time zone), and presented a complete, accurate result matching the known facts.
